content.en:
"Damn, I knew I wasn't going to that place!"

Qinglong Dao Ancestor was remorseful, but the matter had come to this point, and it was useless for him to regret it!

However, many half-step Sixfold Ancestors used various means to force him out, and also used his descendants to use special primordial treasures to find his traces.

As a result, he had to flee again and again.

......

this day.

Ye Tian came to the Qinglong High Origin Domain, and soon learned about the deeds of the Qinglong Dao Ancestor.

"The Qinglong Dao Ancestor actually fell half a step to the Sixfold Origin Ancestor realm?"

Ye Tian was a little surprised.

Can this cultivation still fall?

At this time, Han Xuan said: "Master, the Sixfold Ancestor Condensed Dao Fruit is a Dao Fruit formed by the fusion of the Extreme Dao, once the Dao Fruit is completely destroyed, the cultivation will fall, and it will not be able to be destroyed unless it is condensed to the level of an immortal Dao Fruit." Of course, even if it was a Sixfold Origin Ancestor that had just broken through, its Dao Fruit would be very difficult to destroy. But once it is really destroyed, the foundation is completely destroyed, and the origin of the Extreme Extreme Dao is damaged, not only can he not re-enter the Sixfold Primordial Ancestor, but even the power of his own Extreme Extreme Dao has been greatly reduced, and his strength is not as good as when he was at the peak of the half-step Sixfold Primordial Ancestor!"

"I see!"

Ye Tian understood.

Han Xuan knew so well, in his previous life, he must have been above the Sixfold Ancestor, and he was really hammered!

"Disciple Han Xuan, what do you think of us robbing the Qinglong Dao Ancestor? Anyway, this guy is not a good person, he has killed countless people, offended countless half-step six-fold ancestors, and there is no psychological burden to rob him!"

Ye Tian said.

"Master, after all, it is a sixfold ancestor, even if the foundation is destroyed, if you are desperate, you can still exert a blow from the sixfold ancestor, it's too dangerous!"

Han Xuan said.

And she still hasn't said a word, that is, she is too weak at the moment, if she follows Ye Tian, what if she is affected.

She doesn't want to die!

"Apprentice, don't worry, your master respects me invincible, even if the Qinglong Dao Ancestor recovers, I am not afraid of him, not to mention that he is now abolished!" Ye Tian said.

Han Xuan rolled her eyes, she didn't believe that her cheap master was really invincible with a half-step six-fold ancestor! Maybe she would only break through to a half-step six-fold ancestor soon, and she would know that she was bragging!

......

"You're really going to betray me!"

Qinglong Dao Ancestor stared coldly at the group of half-step sixfold ancestors around him.

He, again, was discovered.

And the half-step sixfold ancestor who chased and killed him this time was almost all the half-step sixfold ancestor of the Qinglong Dao Palace, which made him extremely angry.

His Dao Fruit was shattered, his foundation was destroyed, his former subordinates also betrayed him, and all the half-step sixfold ancestors of the entire Qinglong Dao Palace came to hunt him down.

How sad he was at this time!

At this time, a half-step sixfold primordial ancestor said: "Qinglong Dao Ancestor, you are too selfish, all the resources in the Qinglong High Origin Domain have been occupied by him, and he will not give us any benefits, and if you are not satisfied with the slightest, you will be killed." In these endless years, there have been thirteen half-step sixfold ancestors in the Blue Dragon Dao Palace who have died in your hands, and there is also a peerless genius who has the hope of stepping into the sixfold primordial ancestors. Moreover, you have the treasure of the Sixfold Ancestor in your hand, and you have never thought of taking it out. If it weren't for the Sixfold Ancestor, who would be willing to submit to you. The entire Qinglong Dao Palace's twenty-three half-step sixfold ancestors all want to kill you, we were forced by you to join the Qinglong Dao Palace, constantly squeezing us, and now your foundation is completely destroyed, don't you want to escape!"

"Don't talk nonsense with him, just kill him!"

Another half-step sixfold ancestor said.

Bang!!!

The Great War has begun!

Soon, Qinglong Dao Ancestor was injured, but he directly sacrificed a spell, tearing apart the imprisoned time and space, and fled directly.

But at this moment, a large seal appeared.

In an instant, this area was directly imprisoned, and even the Qinglong Dao Ancestor was intercepted.

"Canglong Seal, Canglong Holy Ancestor, you dare to stop me!"

Qinglong Dao Ancestor was furious.

"Hahaha, Qinglong Dao Ancestor, I don't want to kill you, you have a Taixuan light and a purple Xuan light on your body, give them to me, and I will let you go!"

The Canglong Holy Ancestor appeared.

And he urged the Canglong Seal with all his strength to prevent the Qinglong Dao Ancestor from escaping.

"Damn, if it weren't for my realm falling, otherwise a single blow would be enough to shatter your Canglong Seal!" said the Qinglong Dao Ancestor angrily.

The Canglong Seal is just the top Primordial Dao Treasure, not the Primordial Dao Treasure, if it is the Primordial Dao Treasure, he really can't help it.

Right now, he had no hope of escaping unless he tried his best.

But once you are desperate, you can't escape far!

"Qinglong Dao Ancestor, you are a dignified sixfold ancestor, and now you are really miserable!

A figure appeared, it was a white-haired young man.

However, when many half-step six-fold ancestors saw this white-haired young man, their expressions changed drastically.

"White Devil Holy Ancestor, this guy is here!"

At this moment, even the Canglong Holy Ancestor had a solemn expression.

This White Demon Saint Ancestor is not an ordinary half-step sixfold ancestor, it is said that he has fused sixty-six will clones, and is already qualified to impact the sixfold ancestor realm, but he has not been impacted.

There are even Sixfold Origin Ancestors who say that the White Devil Saint Ancestor has a special physique, and there are treasures on his body that assist in impacting the Sixfold Ancestor, if it is to impact the Sixfold Ancestor, the success rate is more than thirty percent.

In other words, the White Demon Saint Ancestor really wants to impact the Sixfold Primordial Ancestor, and if he hits a few more times, he has a great hope of becoming a Sixfold Primordial Ancestor.

"White Demon Saint Ancestor, you are also here, your master Venerable Blue Demon Dao Ancestor is my friend, you also want to intervene?" Qinglong Dao Ancestor said coldly.

"Hahaha, Qinglong Dao Ancestor, you are qualified to be friends with my master, if you are still a sixfold ancestor, I will naturally respect you, but unfortunately you are no longer a sixfold ancestor, and the hope of recovery is almost impossible, even if the entire Ancient Dao Alliance really helps you, it will not be able to successfully restore you. Unless you can find a sevenfold ancestor to help you, but you can't find that being. So, you're not qualified to be respected. Moreover, your temperament is too bad, you have offended too many Primordial Ancestors, and none of the Sixfold Primordial Ancestors will protect you, don't you understand?"

"If you really want to fight hard, I can kill one of you!"

Qinglong Dao Ancestor threatened.

"I know, so I only need your resources and treasures, not your life!" said the White Devil Saint Ancestor.

"I can't wait any longer, if I wait a little longer, there will be a half-step six-fold ancestor coming, and I have to use that hole card to escape!"

Qinglong Dao Ancestor secretly said.

I saw that he took out a piece of shard, which activated the power in it.

The next moment.

An illusory portal emerged, directly ignoring the blockade of these half-step sixfold ancestors.

Then, he stepped out to the other side of the primordial Black Sea, evading their suppression.

"Qinglong Dao Ancestor has escaped, chase!"

A group of half-step six-fold ancestors chased and killed.

This time.

Qinglong Dao Ancestor was not going to stay in the Qinglong High Origin Region, he had to flee to other High Origin Regions, otherwise he really couldn't escape.

But suddenly.

Two figures appeared in front of him and stopped him.

"I'm lucky, I actually found you Qinglong Dao Ancestor!"

Ye Tian smiled.

Han Xuan on the side was speechless, what kind of luck is this, if Qinglong Dao Ancestor is desperate, she is afraid that she will be finished!

This master is too confident in his own strength!
